---
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/asl_bloom_on_phone.png
  image-width: 100%
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/datapages/datapage
    - icon: globe
      text: Surveys
      href: https://allisonhorst.github.io/palmerpenguins/
    - icon: file-text
      text: Poster
      href: https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0090081

citation:
  type: article-journal
  title: Mythbusting in EHDI - Parental Beliefs About Language Development in Deaf Children.
  issued: 2025
  author:
    - Erin E. Campbell
    - Arielle Spellun
    - Endre Elvestad
    - Jennie Pyers
    - Naomi Caselli
  container-title: Early Hearing Detection and Intervention annual conference
  doi: 10.1371/journal.pone.0090081
---

## ASL Bloom Survey Data

This dataset is from a set of surveys administered to caregivers of deaf children, who were recruited through the [ASL Bloom app](https://www.aslbloom.com/).

Data were collected and made available by [Dr. Erin Campbell](https://erinecampbell.com) at the [Boston University Deaf Center](https://deafcenter.bu.edu/). The dataset contains data from 166 caregivers.

Data are available by [CC-0](https://creativecommons.org/public-domain/cc0/) license.
